title: valeriana officinalis subsp. tenuifolia
intro: Valeriana officinalis subsp. tenuifolia, also known as American valerian, is a subspecies of the valerian plant native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include sedative, anti-anxiety, and antispasmodic effects, derived from the presence of valerenic acid and other compounds. The health benefits of American valerian include improved sleep quality, reduced stress and anxiety, and relief from muscle cramps and spasms. American valerian can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
